subcodes.first_line: The Book which the All-Merciful hath revealed unto them that believed in God at an hour when every possessor of knowledge and sound judgment denied, save whom God, the Lord, willed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن لمن آمن بالله اذ کفر کل ذی علم رشید الا من شاء الله رب
